untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by regression line slope and selecting strongest/weakest across a universe. This is a cross-sectional portfolio signal requiring external ranking logic not available in single-instrument indicator set. Regression slope itself is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Implementation requires custom ranking module outside standard technical indicator framework.
translation_notes: This is a relative strength signal requiring multi-stock ranking by linear regression slope. The backtest engine would need to: (1) calculate regression slope for each stock over a lookback period, (2) rank all stocks by slope value, (3) identify top N (strongest) and bottom N (weakest), then (4) execute long on strongest and short on weakest simultaneously. Standard single-stock indicators cannot express this ranking requirement.
